idea-plugin.name: Nexora Language Support
idea-plugin.description:
Complete Nexora language support for IntelliJ IDEA and other JetBrains IDEs. Features:
  • Syntax highlighting for .nx files
  • Code completion
  • Structure view
  • Go to definition
  • Find usages
  • Refactoring support
Nexora is a modern programming language with closures, pattern matching, classes, and more.
idea-plugin.changeNotes: Version 1.0.0: - Initial release - Syntax highlighting - Code completion - Structure view
